transcript: Speaker A: Mr. Sushanth, unga paiyan smart thaan. Aana English zero. Thadumaari pesinaan. Oru parents-ra neenga thaan konjam gavanom kudukkanum. [Mr. Sushanth, your son is smart. But English is zero. He stumbles while speaking. As parents, you need to pay some attention.] Speaker B: Madam, enakke English pesa theriyaadhu. Appram naan eppadi avanukku kathu kuduppen? [Madam, I myself don't know how to speak English. Then how will I teach him?] Speaker A: Ippo ellaam English kathuradhu rombave easy. Adhunaala thaan naan ungala maadhiri parents-ku SpeakX app suggest panren. [Now learning English is very easy. That's why I suggest the SpeakX app to parents like you.] Speaker B: SpeakX app-aa? [SpeakX app?] Speaker C: In this, there is an AI teacher. They will teach you to speak English. Speaker A: Veetula free-aa irukkumbodho illa office-la irukkumbodho oru 15 minutes practice pannunga, podhum. Neenga yedhaavadhu thappa pesinaa udane correct panniduvaanga. Ennoda student-oda amma kooda 15 days back thaan practice start pannaanga. Ippo avanga pasangalukkum English kathu kudukkuraanga. Enkitta kooda confidently-aa English pesuraanga. [Practice for just 15 minutes when you are free at home or at the office, that's enough. If you speak anything wrong, they will correct it immediately. Even my student's mother started practicing just 15 days ago. Now she is teaching English to her kids too. She even speaks English confidently with me.] Speaker B: Correct madam, naan English kathukittaadhaan en maganum nallaa English pesalaam. [Correct madam, only if I learn English, my son can also speak English well.] Speaker A: Kandippa 15 days kudunga. Unga English fluent aayidum. [Definitely give it 15 days. Your English will become fluent.] Speaker B: Indha AI teacher-ku evvalavu selavu? [How much does this AI teacher cost?] Speaker A: Just 2 rupees-ku 7 days trial irukku. Innaikke download pannunga. [There is a 7 days trial for just 2 rupees. Download today.]

summary: A teacher informs a parent that his son struggles with English, prompting the parent to admit his own lack of English skills. The teacher recommends the SpeakX app, highlighting its AI teacher that corrects mistakes in real-time with just 15 minutes of daily practice. She encourages him to download the app by offering a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees.
